name: PetDesk Veterinary Client Engagement API
what_it_does: PetDesk Veterinary Client Communication and Engagement REST API for veterinary practice client communication, appointment management, and pet owner engagement. Enables AI agents to manage automated appointment reminder and confirmation for veterinary practice communication, handle online appointment booking and request management for client self-service workflow, access wellness reminder and preventive care alert for patient compliance automation, retrieve two-way client messaging and telemedicine integration for client communication, manage prescription refill request management for pharmacy workflow automation, handle pet health record and vaccine reminder for client engagement, access review management and reputation automation for veterinary practice marketing, retrieve client retention analytics and communication performance for practice management, manage PIMS integration (Cornerstone, AVImark, Impromed, Covetrus) for bidirectional data sync, and automate pet owner education and post-visit communication for client experience.
use_cases: Sending appointment reminders from veterinary communication agents
Managing online booking from client self-service agents
Automating wellness reminders from preventive care agents
Handling refill requests from pharmacy workflow agents
not_for: Human healthcare practices without veterinary context
Large specialty hospitals with custom client communication platforms
Practices not using supported PIMS integrations
best_when: A veterinary practice using PetDesk integrated with their PIMS (Cornerstone, AVImark, etc.) wants AI agents to automate client reminders, appointment booking, wellness alerts, and prescription refill workflow.
avoid_when: VCPR PRESCRIPTION COMMUNICATION RISK: PetDesk manages prescription refill requests — automated refill approval communication requires VCPR validation; automated approval without veterinarian review creates VCPR compliance issues under state veterinary practice acts. TCPA compliance — automated SMS appointment reminders and marketing messages require prior express written consent; mass veterinary SMS campaigns without consent create TCPA exposure. HIPAA analog for veterinary — while HIPAA doesn't technically cover veterinary practices, sensitive pet health information and owner data has reasonable privacy expectations; automated data sharing requires clear client consent.

auth.notes: PetDesk uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for PIMS integrations. REST API with JSON. Portland, Oregon HQ. Founded 2012 by Taylor Cavanah. Private (Warburg Pincus-backed). 10,000+ veterinary practice customers. Veterinary client communication market leader. Deep PIMS integration (Cornerstone, AVImark, Impromed, Covetrus). Competes with VitusVet, Demandforce, and Weave for veterinary client communication.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-practice monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-practice subscription; enterprise DSO pricing
pricing.notes: Portland, OR. Founded 2012. Warburg Pincus-backed. 10,000+ vet practices. Veterinary client communication leader. Deep PIMS integration. Competes with VitusVet and Weave.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per PIMS integration

known_agent_gotchas: VCPR REFILL COMPLIANCE: Automated prescription refill request routing must include VCPR validation; automated approval communication without veterinarian review violates state veterinary practice act prescription requirements

TCPA SMS consent — automated appointment reminder and wellness alert SMS requires prior express written consent (PEWC); mass SMS to clients without documented TCPA consent creates class action exposure ($500-$1,500/message)

PIMS integration data freshness — PetDesk syncs with PIMS (Cornerstone, AVImark) on a scheduled basis; automated reminders based on stale PIMS data may create incorrect appointment reminders or duplicate communications
Reminder opt-out management — automated client communication must respect opt-out requests; failed opt-out processing creates TCPA and CAN-SPAM compliance violations

Multi-PIMS compatibility — PetDesk integrates with multiple PIMS with different data models; automated API integration may behave differently depending on which PIMS the practice uses; test with target PIMS

Telemedicine VCPR considerations — automated telemedicine appointment scheduling must account for state-specific VCPR establishment requirements for telemedicine; some states require prior in-person examination for telemedicine VCPR
agent_readiness.security_notes: Veterinary client communication. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US/CA. Client and pet health communication data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Veterinary communication. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Client and pet health data.
